basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 24 June 2026 on the official website iiti.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech in Engineering Physics, M.Sc. in Physics, Astronomy / B.S.-M.S. (5-year Integrated) in Physics / or Applied Physics, Astronomy, Space Science, M.Tech./M.S. (by research)/M.E. in Engineering Physics/Space Science and Engineering, Valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET (including LS)/JEST or any national-level examinations conducted by Central government departments and their agencies
qualification.details: B.Tech in Engineering Physics, M.Sc. in Physics, Astronomy / B.S.-M.S. (5-year Integrated) in Physics / or Applied Physics, Astronomy, Space Science OR M.Tech./M.S. (by research)/M.E. in Engineering Physics/Space Science and Engineering with valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET (including LS)/JEST or any national-level examinations conducted by Central government departments and their agencies.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Indore is 10th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus HRA as per norms.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech in Engineering Physics, M.Sc. in Physics/Astronomy, or equivalent, along with a valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET/JEST score.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be made for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post announced by IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIT Indore located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Indore is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. What is the interview date for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The interview for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is scheduled to be held on 13th July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application link?
faq.answer: You can find the direct links to the official notification PDF and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
